jargon.description: A comforting, safe discussion space led by senior oncology nurses to clarify estrogen receptors, HER2 scores, and biopsy terminology.

screening.venue: National Cancer Centre Singapore (NCCS) Lecture Hall Hall B
screening.description: Learn exactly what medical records, scan CDs, and oncology referral slips to compile, and practice setting agenda items with your caregiver.

crisis.eventName: Clinical Chemo Side Effect Care & Calming Session
crisis.venue: National University Cancer Institute, Singapore (NCIS) Wellness Suite
crisis.description: A nurse-led support circle focusing on pharmacological side-effect management, pacing fatigue, and guided 4-4-4 diaphragmatic breathing.

healing.description: A sensitive, non-judgmental space for post-surgical outpatients to process scars, discuss prosthetic options, and practice body self-compassion.

fertility.venue: KK Women's and Children's Hospital (KKH) Seminar Room 1
fertility.description: Join fertility specialist doctors to map out egg freezing, IVF pathways, and hormonal shielding timelines before active clinical treatments begin.

sister.eventName: BCF Bigger Sister & Little Sister Matchmaking Luncheon
sister.description: A warm social luncheon matching newly diagnosed patients with experienced breast cancer survivor mentors in long-term clinical remission.

caregiver.description: A complimentary respite retreat for family caregivers focusing on mental health buffers, boundary setting, and secure patient updates.

wellness.eventName: Stigma Mitigation & Financial Oncology Grant Guide
wellness.venue: Tan Tock Seng Hospital (TTSH) Wellness Hub
wellness.description: A comprehensive directory review session for securing BCF financial grants, oncology cost subsidies, and joining mindfulness therapy circles.
